description: A taciturn First Mate of the Asher, and Captain Hipper's capable right hand, Aster is renowned for her outstanding skills. Her quite nature gives her an aloof vibe, but those who know her well understand she's simply prone to drifting into daydreams.

trait.title: Pioneer
trait.description: Increase final damage by 18%. Instantly restores 500 Endurance when hitting enemies with Meteor Rush or Flash Step.

attacks.title: Astral Slash
attacks.description:
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch five consecutive strikes.
First strike: Deals 431% of ATK +2,722 damage, knocking targets back.
Second strike: Deals 388% of ATK +2,451 damage, knocking targets back.
Third strike: Deals 561% of ATK +3,543 damage, knocking targets back.
Fourth strike: Deals damage up to 593% of ATK +3,745, knocking targets back.
Fifth strike: Deals 750% of ATK +4,737 damage, knocking targets back.

attacks.title: Cosmic Slash
attacks.description:
While the Wanderer is airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in the air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 431% of ATK plus 2,722 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 388% of ATK plus 2,451 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 561% of ATK plus 3,543 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 593% of ATK plus 3,745 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 750% of ATK plus 4,737 and knock the target back.

attacks.title: Pulse Pierce
attacks.description:
While on the ground and under Photon Surge, use normal attack to launch five consecutive strikes.
First strike: Deals damage equal to 393% of ATK plus 2,482 to the target and knocks them back.
Second strike: Deals damage equal to 812% of ATK plus 5,128 to the target and knocks them back.
Third strike: Deals damage equal to 873% of ATK plus 5,514 to the target and knocks them back.
Fourth strike: Deals damage up to 1,101% of ATK plus 6,954 to the target and knocks them back.
Fifth strike: Deals damage equal to 1,668% of ATK plus 10,535 to the target and knocks targets airborne.

attacks.title: Void Impact
attacks.description:
While airborne and under Photon Surge, use a normal attack to launch five consecutive strikes, consuming Endurance.
First strike: Deals damage equal to 393% of ATK plus 2,482 to the target and knocks them back.
Second strike: Deals damage equal to 812% of ATK plus 5,128 to the target and knocks them back.
Third strike: Deals damage equal to 873% of ATK plus 5,514 to the target and knocks them back.
Fourth strike: Deals damage up to 1,101% of ATK plus 6,954 to the target and knocks them back.
Fifth strike: Deals damage equal to 1,668% of ATK plus 10,535 to the target and knocks targets airborne.

attacks.title: Edge Grip
attacks.description:
Can be activated during Photon Surge. When Overnova is active, holding the skill button during any of the first five ground hits or holding the normal attack button will trigger the effect, consuming 1 Overnova stack. This effect can only trigger once per Photon Surge.
Deals damage equal to 2,760% of ATK plus 17,432 to nearby enemies.

attacks.title: Boost Strike
attacks.description:
Can be activated during Photon Surge. While Overnova is active, holding the skill button during any of the first five ground hits or while casting Edge Grip, or holding the normal attack button, will trigger the effect and consume 1 Overnova stack. This effect can only trigger once per Photon Surge.
Deals damage equal to 2,267% of ATK plus 14,318 to nearby enemies.

attacks.title: Driftstar Waltz
attacks.description:
Can be activated during Photon Surge. While Overnova is active, holding the skill button during any of the first five ground hits or while casting Boost Strike, or holding the normal attack button, will trigger the effect and consume 1 Overnova stack. This effect can only trigger once per Photon Surge.
Deals damage equal to 4,435% of ATK plus 28,011 to nearby enemies.

attacks.title: Skyfall Verdict
attacks.description:
Hold the normal attack button while airborne, or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using Jetback to trigger Skyfall Verdict.
During the fall, each hit on the target deals 832% of ATK + 5,255 damage. Upon landing, deal damage equal to 1,386% of ATK + 8,754 damage.

attacks.title: Meteor Rush
attacks.description: During Meteor Realm, press normal attack while airborne to trigger Meteor Rush, dealing damage equal to 1,386% of ATK plus 8,754 to nearby targets and inflicting Starfall Shard. Restores a leap attempt upon a successful hit.

attacks.title: Flash Step
attacks.description: During Meteor Realm, press and hold normal attack while airborne to trigger Flash Step, dealing damage equal to 1,386% of ATK plus 8,754 to nearby targets. Hitting non-Boss enemies inflicted with Starfall Shard will trigger an immediate execution (only effective in the World and not applicable to Mecha enemies). Restores a leap attempt upon a successful hit.

dodges.title: Dodge
dodges.description:
Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area.
Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

dodges.title: Glint Raid
dodges.description: Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger a pre-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 832% of ATK plus 5,255 to targets ahead.

dodges.title: Flank Strike
dodges.description: Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger a post-dodge attack, dealing damage up to 1,238% of ATK plus 7,819 to targets ahead.

dodges.title: Rapid Deploy
dodges.description:
Hold the dodge button during the perfect dodge window (use the movement button before dodging) to activate Meteor Realm (unavailable in Apex League). Continuously consumes Endurance and gains Starflow. While Meteor Realm is active, speed boost won't take effect.
During Meteor Realm, press the jump button to interrupt your current swing and instantly align your direction with the camera.
While Meteor Realm is active, press the dodge button to continue swinging. At the start of the swing, the environment will be scanned. If a valid anchor point is detected, the swing does not consume Endurance. If none is found, Twin Stars will create an anchor from the void, and Endurance will be consumed as usual.
During Meteor Realm, touching the water surface triggers a brief skipping state. Press dodge during this time to leap upward quickly.
While in Meteor Realm, move toward a wall to enter wall glide mode. While gliding left or right, press jump to quickly leap off the surface.
All Starflow will be cleared when Meteor Realm ends.

dodges.title: Vector Leap
dodges.description:
Hold the jump button during Meteor Realm to enter Vector Leap, continuously consuming Starflow while active. While Vector Leap is active, speed boost won't take effect.
During Vector Leap, moving the joystick while rotating the camera causes a rapid directional shift.

skills.title: Field Mastery
skills.description:
Enters Photon Surge and gains temporary invincibility, dealing damage equal to 2,458% of ATK plus 15,524 to nearby targets. Increases physical damage by 11% for 30 seconds and gains hyperbody. Cooldown: 21 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects.).
During Photon Surge, using Twin Stars for normal or dodge attacks grants 1 Overnova every 3 seconds, up to 3 points during each Photon Surge. Reach 3 Overnovae while Field Mastery is on cooldown to gain Prism Blades. Removes all Overnovae when Photon Surge ends or Twin Stars is switched to the off-hand slot, and prevents gaining or casting Prism Blades.

skills.title: Prism Blades
skills.description:
Can be activated during Photon Surge. Deals damage equal to 7,240% of ATK plus 45,726 to nearby enemies.
While Fortitude Resonance is active, Prism Blades forcefully taunts enemies within range for 5s. For each taunted target, grants nearby allies a 5% final damage bonus, up to 20% for 20s (If the effect is reapplied, only the highest bonus is applied.).

discharges.title: Blast Whirlpool
discharges.description:
When the weapon is fully charged or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon from another, removes all debuffs from the player, dealing 9,410% of ATK +59,432 damage to nearby enemies. During the skill, gains damage immunity for 1.5s (not applicable in Apex League).
Grants nearby allies damage immunity for 1.5s while Fortitude Resonance is active.

passives.title: Armor Dissolve
passives.description: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts armor dissolve effect on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. Physical attacks will stun targets under the dissolve effect for 2 seconds, and flame attacks will decrease the targets' speed by 50% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

passives.title: Fusion of Mass and Flame
passives.description: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the currently equipped weapon's highest physical/flame base ATK, the highest equipped physical/flame ATK percentage, and the highest equipped physical/flame damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a physical and flame weapon.

passives.title: Physical Resonance
passives.description: Increase Physical ATK by 15% and Physical Resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more Physical weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.

passives.title: Flame Resonance
passives.description: Increase Flame ATK by 15% and Physical Resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more Flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

passives.title: Whispers: On-Field
passives.description: When landing any hit with Twin Stars, it deals damage to nearby targets equal to 256% of Physical ATK plus 3.6% of the player's Max HP plus 133% of the sum of all the player's Resistance Types plus 4.9% of Crit. This effect can be triggered up to 1 time every 1.5s. The On-Field damage counts as normal attack damage. If there is 1 Frost/Volt Weapon of any kind equipped, On-Field damage is multiplied by 1.3. In addition, On-Field damage is not affected by any damage boost effects except from Titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

advancements: Instantly restores 50% HP after casting Field Mastery. Increases Prism Blades damage by 10,860%.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

Reduces Overnova cooldown to 1s. When Overnova is not active, switch to the off-hand slot: After 5s, consecutively attacks nearby enemies in a large area, dealing damage equal to 3,500% of ATK every second for 5s. Increase Physical Damage by 10% and Final Damage by 5% upon casting Field Mastery.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

Ignores targets' Physical Resistance by 15% (the total value of resistance ignored for any single element cannot exceed 50%). Gains 60% Damage Reduction upon casting Edge Grip, Boost Strike, Driftstar Waltz, or Prism Blades.
Increases Final Damage by 28%. When Fortitude Resonance is active, using Meteor Rush or Flash Step against a target with more than 90% HP reduces their HP to exactly 90% of Max HP.

matrices.pc2: Increase Physical ATK by 26% / 28% / 30% / 32%. Increase Final Damage by 3% for 60s for each target killed, up to 2 stacks. This set effect works in the off-hand, and only the set with the highest star rating will take effect.
matrices.pc4: Increase all elemental damage by 21% / 25% / 29% / 33%. Increase Final Damage by an extra 14% when Twin Stars is deployed. Increase Shatter by 100% while Fortitude Resonance is active. This set effect works in the off-hand slot, and only the set with the highest star rating will take effect.

description: As a distinguished Federal Agent and elite member of the Spedial Security Investigation Unit, she's been instructed with the Federation's most classified operations, earning her place as one of Kyran's most reliable confidants.

trait.title: Adjucation
trait.description: Increase final damage by 18%. When equipped with Scarlet Gale, increase physical damage by 30%.

attacks.title: Rapid Sweep
attacks.description:
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 82% of ATK plus 4 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 173% of ATK plus 9 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 235% of ATK plus 12 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 316% of ATK plus 17 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 336% of ATK plus 18 and knock the target back.

attacks.title: Cyclone Blade
attacks.description:
While the wanderer is airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in the air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 82% of ATK plus 4 and knock the target back.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 173% of ATK plus 9 and knock the target back.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 235% of ATK plus 12 and knock the target back.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage up to 316% of ATK plus 17 and knock the target back.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 336% of ATK plus 18 and knock the target back.

attacks.title: Furious Flurry
attacks.description:
While using normal attack on the ground, tap and hold normal attack when using the first to fourth normal attacks to trigger Furious Flurry.
Swing Scarlet Gale, dealing damage equal to 309% of ATK plus 16 to nearby targets.

attacks.title: Gust Hunter
attacks.description:
While on the ground, tap and hold normal attack to trigger Gust Hunter.
Fire a shot at the target, dealing damage equal to 78% of ATK plus 4 to the target upon hit.

attacks.title: Thousand-Ton Slam
attacks.description:
Tap and hold normal attack while airborne (tap when a target is available), or use normal attack while climbing, jumping backward, or using a Jetpack to trigger Thousand-Ton Slam.
Fall down from mid-air. During the course of landing, each hit on an enemy deals damage equal to 186% of ATK plus 10. After landing, deal damage equal to 186% of ATK plus 10 to nearby targets.

dodges.title: Dodge
dodges.description: Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

dodges.title: Glimmering Kick
dodges.description:
Use normal attack during the short perfect dodge window (use a directional button before dodging) to trigger Glimmering Kick, dealing damage equal to 223% of ATK plus 12 to targets ahead.
Become invincible for a short duration during Glimmering Kick.

dodges.title: Hail of Shadows
dodges.description: Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Hail of Shadows, dealing damage equal to 146% of ATK plus 8 to the hit target.

dodges.title: Unseen Shadows
dodges.description: Tap and hold normal attack right after dodging to trigger Unseen Shadows, dealing damage equal to 291% of ATK plus 15 to targets ahead.

skills.title: Radiant Halo
skills.description:
Deal damage equal to 1,075% of ATK plus 57 to nearby targets. Cooldown of 21s (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).
After using Radiant Halo, increase physical DMG by 12% for 30s. Blade of Unity is triggered 6s and 12s after using Radiant Halo, dealing area damage equal to 3,800% of ATK to the selected target.

discharges.title: Windcutting Thunder
discharges.description: When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer and deal damage equal to 1,116% of ATK plus 59 to targets ahead. During this period, gain damage immunity for 1.5 seconds (unavailable in Apex League).

passives.title: Armor Dissolve
passives.description: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts armor dissolve effect on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. Physical attacks will stun targets under the dissolve effect for 2 seconds, and flame attacks will decrease the targets' speed by 50% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

passives.title: Fusion of Mass and Flame
passives.description: When the weapon deals damage, damage is calculated using the currently equipped weapon's highest physical/flame base ATK, the highest equipped physical/flame ATK percentage, and the highest equipped physical/flame damage boost, and the weapon is considered both a physical and flame weapon.

passives.title: Physical Resonance
passives.description: Increase Physical ATK by 15% and Physical Resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more Physical weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects, with Physical Resonance taking precedence.

passives.title: Flame Resonance
passives.description: Increase Flame ATK by 15% and Physical Resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more Flame weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.

passives.title: Scarlet Blade: Swift Cut
passives.description:
When Scarlet Gale is equipped, any weapon's discharge skill will deal damage equal to 73.2% of physical ATK plus 1% of Max HP plus 36.6% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 134.3% of crit to nearby targets.
While in combat, after every 0.5 seconds, the next Swift Cut DMG will be increased by an additional 1 time, up to a maximum of 30 times. When multiple Swift Cut damages exist, the highest initial value is used for calculation. Swift Cut DMG is counted as discharge skill DMG.
If there is 1 frost/volt weapon of any kind equipped, Scarlet Blade DMG is increased to 1.3 times. In addition, Scarlet Blade DMG is not affected by any DMG boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.
When Scarlet Gale is equipped in the main slot and the Wanderer takes lethal damage, performs Swift Lightning during which the Wanderer is immune to damage. The minimum trigger interval is 20 seconds.

advancements: Blade of Unity is triggered at 5, 10, and 15 seconds.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.
When Blade of Unity hits a target, apply Suppress effect for 4 seconds, decreasing the target's movement speed by 20% and dealing damage equal to 480% of ATK every second.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.
When Blade of Unity is triggered, recover 25% of HP. If current HP is less than 50% of max HP, increase recovery to 50% (unaffected by healing bonus effects and unavailable in Apex League).
Increase physical damage boost from Radiant Halo to 40% for 30 seconds.

matrices.pc2: Increase physical ATK by 24% / 26% / 28% / 30% and Scarlet Gale damage to 4,800%. This set effect works in the off-hand slot, and only the set wit the highest star rating will take effect.
matrices.pc4: Increase all elemental damage by 10% / 14% / 18% / 22%. When equipped with Scarlet Gale, increases final damage by 22%. This set effect works in the off-hand slot, and only the set with the highest star rating will take effect.

description: With the help of the Dimensional Quantum Supercomputer framework, the Super Artificial Intelligence: Gesthos Network began evolving into self-awareness.

trait.title: The Authorizer
trait.description: Increase final damage by 18% and gain 12% of elemental damage boost based on the current stat of Star of Oblivion. When using Star of Oblivion, if other equipped weapons are also altered weapons, increase crit damage by 16% and reduce damage taken by 15%.

attacks.title: Void Shredder
attacks.description:
While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 197% of ATK plus 1,244, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 633% of ATK plus 3,988, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 291% of ATK plus 1,838, inflicting 2 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 844% of ATK plus 5,331, inflicting 2 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 861% of ATK plus 5,438, inflicting 3 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
When a Pursuit Pray target is present, use normal attack to trigger Pursuit, diving near the target dealing damage equal to 622% of ATK plus 3,928. On hit, grant 1 stack of Frenzy, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered. Pursuit can be triggered up to 1 time every 4.5 seconds.

attacks.title: Reckoning of Shadow
attacks.description:
While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 197% of ATK plus 1,244, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 633% of ATK plus 3,998, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 291% of ATK plus 1,838, inflicting 2 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 844% of ATK plus 5,331, inflicting 2 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 861% of ATK plus 5,438, inflicting 3 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
When a Pursuit Pray target is present, use normal attack to trigger Pursuit, diving near the target dealing damage equal to 622% of ATK plus 3,928. On hit, grant 1 stack of Frenzy, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered. Pursuit can be triggered up to 1 time every 4.5 seconds.

attacks.title: Chase of Nought
attacks.description:
Tap and hold normal attack or hold during the first to third normal attack on the ground to backflip and trigger Star of Oblivion, hitting up to 2 times. Each hit deals damage equal to 320% of ATK plus 2,021 to the target and fires bullets that deal damage equal to 240% of ATK plus 1,516, marking locked-on targets with Pursuit Prey.
When Dark Star: Chaos is triggered, Chase of Nought inflicts 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets. When Frenzy reaches 3 stacks, Chase of Nought is replaces with Dimensional Seal. Tap and hold normal attack to teleport in front of the locked-on target, capturing its afterimage into the Black Hole (iimune to damage from target during Dimensional Seal), and triggering an explosion that deals damage equal to 1,556% of ATK plus 9,827 to targets in a wide area.

attacks.title: Descent of Stillness
attacks.description:
While airborne, tap and hole normal attack to use Descent of Stillness.
Plunges toward the ground, dealing damage equal to 655% of ATK plus 4,137 to nearby targets.

attacks.title: Echo of Infinity
attacks.description:
When Boundary Zone is used, Void Shredder is replaces with Echo of Infinity. While on the ground, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 191% of ATK plus 1,206, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 446% of ATK plus 2,817, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 704% of ATK plus 4,446, inflicting 2 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 819% of ATK plus 5,173, inflicting 2 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 1,609% of ATK plus 10,162, inflicting 3 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
When a Pursuit Pray target is present, use normal attack to trigger Pursuit, diving near the target dealing damage equal to 1,041% of ATK plus 6,575. On hit, grant 1 stack of Frenzy, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered. Pursuit can be triggered up to 1 time every 4.5 seconds.

attacks.title: Silent End
attacks.description:
When Boundary Zone is used, Reckoning of Shadow is replaces with Silent End. While airborne, use normal attack to launch 5 consecutive attacks in mid-air, consuming endurance.
First Attack: Deal damage equal to 191% of ATK plus 1,206, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Second Attack: Deal damage equal to 446% of ATK plus 2,817, inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Third Attack: Deal damage equal to 626% of ATK plus 3,954, inflicting 2 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fourth Attack: Deal damage equal to 774% of ATK plus 4,888, inflicting 2 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
Fifth Attack: Deal damage equal to 1,485% of ATK plus 9,379, inflicting 3 stack of Entropic Surge on the hit target when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.
When a Pursuit Pray target is present, use normal attack to trigger Pursuit, diving near the target dealing damage equal to 1,041% of ATK plus 6,575. On hit, grant 1 stack of Frenzy, inflicting 2 stacks of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered. Pursuit can be triggered up to 1 time every 4.5 seconds.

dodges.title: Dodge
dodges.description: Dodge right before getting hit to trigger Phantasia, reducing the speed of targets within the area. Become immune to hitstun while dodging.

dodges.title: Shattering Leap
dodges.description: Use normal attack during the short period after dodging to trigger Shattering Leap, dashing forward to strike targets and dealing damage equal to 510% of ATK plus 3,221, which inflicts 1 stack of Entropic Surge when Dark Star: Chaos is active.

dodges.title: Echo of Emptiness
dodges.description: When Boundary Zone is used, Shattering Leap is replaced with Echo of Emptiness. Use normal attack during this short period after dodging to launch missiles, dealing damage equal to 420% of ATK plus 2,653 to hit targets, marking locked-on targets with Pursuit of Prey, and inflicting 1 stack of Entropic Surge on hit targets when Dark Star: Chaos is triggered.

skills.title: Starfall Cleave
skills.description:
Tap skill to leap forward, summoning Star of Oblivion Blades the pierce the ground. The initial strike deals 1,365% of ATK plus 8,621 damage, followed by a dark explosion dealing 2,129% of ATK plus 13,446 damage to enemies in range. Grants Dark Star with effects based on Star of Oblivion's current stat:
Dark Star: Retrograde: with flame-physical stat, Starfall Cleave ignites targets, dealing35% flame damage per second for 20 seconds while boosting flame damage by 17% for 25 seconds Hits grand 1 Chaos stack (max 1 per second). At 6 stacks, resets and launches 6 homing projectiles at random targets, each dealing 570% of ATK damage and restoring 2% Max HP. Multiple hits on locked targets inflict 100% Slow for 1 second, decaying over duration. Cooldown: 25 seconds. (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).
Dark Star: Frozen: With frost-volt stat, boost Star of Oblivion's final damage by 55% for 25 seconds. Restores 10% Max HP after each Pursuit. When Star of Oblivion is in the off-hand slot, deals 600% frost damage per seconds to nearby targets. Cooldown: 25 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).
Dark Star: Chaos: With physical-flame stat, boosts Star of Oblivbion's final damage by 25% for 20 seconds. On hit, inflicts Entropic Surge to the target. Upon reaching 10 stacks, resets all stacks and triggers an explosion that deals damage equal to 525% of ATK to nearby targets. When targets marked with Entropic Surge die, their stacks spread to nearby enemies. When using Obliteration Blade, removes all Entropic Surge marks within the range and triggers and explosion. When Star of Oblivion is in the off-hand slot, deals damage equal to 735% of ATK per seconds and inflicts 1 Entropic Surge to nearby targets. Cooldown 21 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown cleaning, resetting, or changing effects).
Dark Star: Pulse: With volt-frost stat, increases Star of Oblivion's volt damage by 6% for 20 seconds. Gain 10 Charge stacks. hits consume 1 stack (max 1 per seconds)) to deal damage equal to 500% of ATK to nearby targets. At 0 stack, deals and additional damage equal to 1200% of ATK and restores 25% of Max HP per target hit. Cooldown: 20 seconds (this is not affected by other cooldown clearing, resetting, or changing effects).

skills.title: Void Pursuit
skills.description:
Tap and hold skill to create a Boundary Zone after a brief charge, slowing all enemies within. While the Boundary Zone is active, switching to Star of Oblivion allows using Void Annihilation without charge cost. Launches missiles dealing damage equal to 737% of ATK plus 4,655, marking hit targets for Pursuit while gaining the Dark Star effect matrching the Starfall Cleave's element. With altered element, Void Pursuit triggers Dark Star: Rebirth:
Dark Star: Rebirth: While Boundary Zone is active, stores all damage dealt. When Boundary Zone is terminated by Oblitaration Blade or Void Annihilation, unleash a 100% of stored damage to all targets in range (capped at ATK x 2,000 in solo mode, ATK x 5,000 in team mode. Only affected by titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects).

skills.title: Obliteration Blade
skills.description: After 10 seconds in the Boundary Zone or completing the final strike of Echo of Infinity, the skill is replaces with Obliteration Blade. Summon Voidpiercer to dash forward, placing a Singularity in her wake. After a brief charge, pierces through the Singularity, dealing damage equal to 661% of ATK plus 4,175 to enemies in her path. The Singularity immobilzes enemies withing range, expanding to its maximum range before collapsing in a slashing attack that deals damage equal to 1,802% of ATK plus 11,381, ending the Boundary Zone.

skills.title: Divine Arrival
skills.description: With Star of Oblivion, Wanderers can view the survival status of all world bosses on the map. When equipped with Star of Oblivion, tap on previously defeated world bosses on the map to trigger Divine Arrival, transmitting above the boss to strike. Upon landing, deal damage equal to 655% of ATK plus 4,137 to nearby targets. Transmission via Divine Arrival remains available during boss respawn. Can be triggered up to 1 time every minute.

discharges.title: Void Annihilation
discharges.description: When weapon charge is full or Phantasia is triggered, upon switching to this weapon, remove all debuffs from the Wanderer transforms into Voidpiercer, and unleash a gigantic Black Hole, inflicting a 100% Slowing effect on targets in the area. Compress and unleash the Black Hole from hands, triggering an explosion, dealing damage up to 3,474% of ATK plus 21,941. While the Boundary Zone is active, using Void Annihilation will terminate the Boundary Zone effect. During Void Annihilation, use skills to disengage from discharge with Voidpiercer completing the discharge, gaming damage immunity for 1.5 seconds (unavailable in Apax League).

passives.title: Altered Damage
passives.description: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack will mark the target, causing an explosion after 5 seconds. Additionally inflict 25% of all damage received by the target during the duration of the mark, up to a total of 560% of your ATK. Only 1 mark can exist on a target at a time.

passives.title: Force Impact
passives.description: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack applies Force Impact on the enemy for 45 seconds, increasing their frost and volt damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). Force Impact replaces the target's grievous status, and targets with Force Impact cannot become grievous. Frost attacks will freeze targets with Force Impact for 2 seconds, and volt attacks will remove the targets' buffs. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

passives.title: Armor Dissolve
passives.description: When the weapon is fully charged, the next attack inflicts Armor Dissolve on the target for 45 seconds, increasing their flame and physical damage taken by 10% (and an additional 15% in team play). This effect will replace the grievous status on the target, and targets with this effect cannot become grievous. Physical attacks will stun targets under the dissolve effect for 2 seconds, and flame attacks will decrease the targets' speed by 50% for 5 seconds. This effect can only trigger 1 time every 15 seconds on the same target.

passives.title: Elemental Resonance
passives.description:
Based on the matched element of Star of Oblivion, the following Elemental Resonance can be activated:
Flame: Increases Flame ATK by 15% and Flame Resistance by 25%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Flame Weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Flame Resonance or Flame Reaction effects, with Flame Resonance taking precedence.
Frost: Increases Frost ATK by 15% and Frost Resistance by 25%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Frost Weapons. This set effect works in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Frost Resonance or Frost Reaction effects, with Frost Resonance taking precedence.
Volt: Increases Volt Attack by 15% and Volt Resistance by 25%. Activate by equipping 2 or more Volt weapons. Active in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Volt Resonance or Volt Reaction effects, with Volt Resonance taking precedence.
Physical: Increases Physical ATK by 15% and Physical Resistance by 25%. Activated by equipping 2 or more Physical Weapons. Active in the off-hand slot. Cannot stack with other Physical Resonance or Physical Reaction effects. Physical Resonance takes precedence.

passives.title: Elemental Tuning
passives.description: When equipped with Star of Oblivion, if the elements of the other two weapons match, Star of Oblivion's element adopts with the same element. Otherwise, it shifts to the altered element.

passives.title: Chaotic Wave
passives.description: Three altered weapons reduce the hit enemies' final damage by 15% for 5 seconds.

passives.title: Evernal Shadow: Unload
passives.description:
After using Starfall Cleave, deal damage equal to 137% of altered ATK plus 19.5% of the Wanderer's Max HP plus 70% of the sum of all the Wanderer's resistance types plus 246% of crit to targets hit every second for 30 seconds. Multiple Unload damage cannot be stacked.
Eternal Shadow damage counts as skill damage. If there is 1 physical/flame/frost/volt weapon of any kind equipped, Eternal Shadow damage is multplied by 1.3 times. In addition, Eternal Shadow damage is not affected by damage boost effects except from titan equipment's rare stats, and won't trigger additional attack effects.

advancements: Normal Attack: Pursuit's damage doubles, inflicting a bried 70% Slow effect on hit.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 16%.

During Dark Star, the Wanderer will ignore 15% of the target's resistance (each element's total resistance ignored cannot exceed 50%). Upon entering the combat state, switching to Star of Oblivion for the first time allows using Void Annihilation without charge cost.
Increase the current weapon's base ATK growth by 32%.

When the Dark Star is triggered, the Wanderer obtains a shield equal to 60% of Max HP. This shield can stack with other shields, but the total shield value cannot exceed 100% of Max HP. Any excess witll be converted to equivalent healing.
Increase final damage by 16%, all elemental damage boosted by 16%. This set effect works in the off-hand slot.

matrices.pc2: Increase all elemental ATK by 26% / 28% / 30% / 32%, and ignore 35% of the target's shield when equipped with Star of Oblivion. This set effect works in the off-hand slot, and only the set with the highest star rating will take effect.
matrices.pc4: Increase final damage by 10% / 14% / 18% / 22%. When equipped with Star of Oblivion, increases the final damage by 8% and Crit damage by 15%. This set effect works in the off-hand slot and only the set with the highest star rating will take effect.
